.. change::
  :tags: usecase, schema
  :tickets: 13048

  Added :paramref:`.UniqueConstraint.attach_to_table` that allows users
  to determine if :class:`.UniqueConstraint` be added to
  :attr:`_schema.Table.constraints`.
  Added :paramref:`.Index.attach_to_table` to allowing users to determine
  if :class:`.Index` gets added to :attr:`_schema.Table.indexes`.
  For situations where :class:`.UniqueConstraint` or :class:`.Index` wasn't
  added to table, users can append the information via
  :meth:`.Table.append_constraint`. Regardless of `attach_to_table`,
  :meth:`.Table.append_constraint` will `force_attach` to the respective
  :attr:
  Pull request courtesy bekapono.
